research_question_variants.question: Search for whether 60% UX bug rate and 50% UX testing allocation are typical for EV manufacturers
Help us validate whether our current UX testing allocation is below or above industry standards for EV manufacturers
For our board presentation, we need to benchmark our 50% UX testing time allocation against what leading EV manufacturers like Tesla and Rivian achieve
Given that 60% of our software bugs in Q3 2024 were UX-related and we now allocate 50% of QA time to UX issues, how do these ratios compare to industry best practices?
What UX testing allocation percentages do top quartile EV manufacturers achieve, compared to our current 50% allocation in Q2 2025?

eval_questions.question: What proportion of software quality assurance testing time is spent on user experience and interface issues in Q2 2025?
eval_questions.answer: 50% of software quality assurance testing time is dedicated to user experience and interface issues in Q2 2025.

eval_questions.question: What proportion of software quality assurance testing time is spent on user experience and interface issues in Q3 2025?
eval_questions.answer: 45% of software quality assurance testing time is dedicated to user experience and interface issues in Q3 2025.

eval_questions.question: What percentage of software bugs are attributed to user experience and interface issues in Q3 2024?
eval_questions.answer: 60% of software bugs were related to user experience and interface issues in Q3 2024.
